description: While healing another Survivor, both you and the healed Survivor gain the Elusive Status Effect. When you finish healing the Obsession, they gain the Elusive Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: A Place For Us

description: When retrieving an Item from a Chest, there is a {chance}% chance that an Add-on of Uncommon Rarity or lower will be attached to it.
name: Ace in the Hole

description: When the Exit Gates are powered, instantly heal one Health State and sprint at 150% of your normal Running Movement speed for {duration} seconds. Adrenaline ignores the Exhausted Status Effect but causes it for 60/50/40 seconds.
name: Adrenaline

description: After you heal or are healed by another Survivor, that Survivor's Aura is revealed to you and your Aura is revealed to them for the remainder of the Trial. The Aura-reading range is {range} metres.
name: Aftercare

description: When the Killer performs a Break action within {range} metres, their Aura is revealed to you for 5 seconds.
name: Alert

description: You see the Auras of dropped Pallets. Press the Active Ability button while standing beside a dropped Pallet to reset it to its upright position. This perk has a cooldown of {cooldown} seconds.
name: Any Means Necessary

description: When your Toolbox is depleted, you keep the Toolbox and its Add-ons. For the next {duration} seconds, the Toolbox is recharged by {charges} Charges per second.
name: Apocalyptic Ingenuity

description: When searching a Chest, there is a {chance}% chance of a Chest refilling with an Item of higher Rarity. Appraisal can activate up to {uses} time(s) per Trial.
name: Appraisal

description: For each Survivor you heal from the Injured State to the Healthy State, Autodidact gains 1 Token, up to a maximum of {max} Tokens. Each Token grants a +15% bonus to Skill Check success on Healing actions. For each Token, the Skill Check bonus progression is increased.
name: Autodidact

description: When you unhook a Survivor, the unhooked Survivor leaves no Scratch Marks or Pools of Blood for {duration} seconds. You see the Killer's Aura for 8 seconds.
name: Babysitter

description: When another Survivor is picked up by the Killer, you break into a sprint at {speed}% of your normal Running Movement speed for 5 seconds towards the Killer.
name: Background Player

description: After a Generator is completed, gain a {speed}% bonus to Repair speed for 30 seconds.
name: Bada Bada Boom

description: After falling from a great height, you break into a sprint at 150% of your normal Running Movement speed for {duration} seconds and stagger is reduced to 0.75 seconds. This perk causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds.
name: Balanced Landing

description: After completing a Generator, press the Active Ability button to perform an inspiring performance for {duration} seconds. Survivors in range receive a {speed}% bonus to Repair, Healing, and Cleansing speeds for 90 seconds.
name: Bardic Inspiration

description: While you are repairing a Generator, the Aura of that Generator is revealed to all other Survivors within {range} metres.
name: Better Together

description: When you complete a Healing action on another Survivor, that Survivor benefits from a {speed}% bonus to all Action speeds for 30 seconds.
name: Better than New

description: When you are healing a Survivor, Grunts of Pain from both you and the Survivor being healed are suppressed. Failed Healing Skill Checks do not trigger a Loud Noise Notification and only apply a {penalty}% regression penalty.
name: Bite the Bullet

description: After completing {threshold}% progress on any Generator, Blast Mine activates. While active, performing a Repair action on a Generator for 3 seconds installs a Blast Mine trap. The trap persists for {duration} seconds.
name: Blast Mine

description: When you or the Obsession are injured, you see the Obsession's Aura. When you and the Obsession both are injured, you both gain a {speed}% Haste Status Effect.
name: Blood Pact

description: While you are Exhausted, performing a Conspicuous Action for {duration} seconds removes the Exhausted Status Effect.
name: Blood Rush

description: While being carried by the Killer, your Wiggling causes the Killer to strafe sideways {amount}% more. You obscure the Killer's ability to see Hook Auras within {range} metres.
name: Boil Over

description: The Auras of other Survivors are revealed to you when they are within {range} metres.
name: Bond

description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it, creating a Boon Totem. Injured Survivors within the Boon Totem's range benefit from a {speed}% bonus to Healing speed.
name: Boon: Circle of Healing

description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it. Survivors within the Boon Totem's range benefit from a {speed}% Haste Status Effect.
name: Boon: Dark Theory

description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it. Survivors within the Boon Totem's range benefit from a {speed}% bonus to their Recovery speed and can fully recover from the Dying State.
name: Boon: Exponential

description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it. Survivors within the Boon Totem's range see the Auras of Chests, Generators, and Exit Gate switches within {range} metres.
name: Boon: Illumination

description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it. Survivors within the Boon Totem's range have their Scratch Marks and Aura hidden from the Killer.
name: Boon: Shadow Step

description: After unhooking a Survivor, the unhooked Survivor gains the Endurance Status Effect for {duration} seconds and gains a 7% Haste Status Effect for 10 seconds.
name: Borrowed Time

description: Your Healing speed is increased by {speed}%. Item efficiency on Medkits is decreased by 20%.
name: Botany Knowledge

description: When you look in the direction of the Killer, if you are outside their Terror Radius, their Aura is revealed for {duration} seconds. This perk has a cooldown.
name: Bound by Obsession

description: After being unhooked, the Hook breaks and the Killer's Aura is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Breakdown

description: When within {range} metres of a carried Survivor, you gain a 5/6/7% Haste Status Effect. The carried Survivor's Wiggle speed is increased by 5%.
name: Breakout

description: When healing a Survivor in the Dying State, that Survivor gains the Endurance Status Effect for {duration} seconds after being healed.
name: Buckle Up

description: When an Item is depleted, Built to Last activates. After hiding inside a Locker for {duration} seconds, the Item is refilled to {charges}% of its base Charges.
name: Built to Last

description: You do not scream or make noise from the Killer's Abilities that would cause you to scream. You do not disturb Crows. Action speeds for Cleansing and Blessing Totems are reduced by {penalty}%.
name: Calm Spirit

description: While you are on the Hook in the Struggle Phase, Camaraderie activates when another Survivor is within {range} metres of the Hook. The Hook's Struggle Phase timer is paused for 20/28/34 seconds.
name: Camaraderie

description: After blinding the Killer, gain a {speed}% Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds and see the Killer's Aura for 6 seconds.
name: Champion of Light

description: When you unhook a Survivor, gain a {speed}% bonus to Healing speed for 30 seconds.
name: Change of Plan

description: After cleansing or blessing a Totem, Chemical Trap activates. Press the Active Ability button while in a Pallet area to install a Chemical Trap. When the Killer breaks the Pallet, the Chemical Trap triggers, creating a cloud that inflicts the Hindered Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Chemical Trap

description: After cleansing or blessing a Totem, press the Active Ability button to see the Auras of Exit Gate switches, Generators, Hooks, and Chests within {range} metres for 10 seconds.
name: Clairvoyance

description: After unhooking yourself or being unhooked, you gain the Endurance Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Your Scratch Marks and Pools of Blood are hidden for the same duration.
name: Clean Break

description: When hooked, press the Active Ability button to attempt to unhook yourself with a {chance}% increased chance. If you successfully unhook yourself, nearby Survivors gain a speed boost.
name: Come and Get Me!

description: When a Survivor is hooked, you gain a {speed}% bonus to Repair speed for 30 seconds.
name: Conviction

description: When you fail a Skill Check while repairing, Corrective Action consumes a Token to convert it into a Good Skill Check. You start with {tokens} Token(s) and gain a Token when a Survivor near you succeeds a Great Skill Check.
name: Corrective Action

description: You cleanse Totems {speed}% faster. After cleansing a Hex Totem, the Aura of the farthest Totem is revealed for 4 seconds.
name: Counterforce

description: After performing a fast vault in Chase, you do not leave Scratch Marks or make footstep sounds for {duration} seconds. This perk has a cooldown of 45 seconds.
name: Cut Loose

description: After performing a fast vault, you leave no Scratch Marks for {duration} seconds.
name: Dance With Me

description: Each time a Generator is completed, the Killer's Aura is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Dark Sense

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: When the Killer performs a Basic Attack on you, press the Active Ability button to gain the Endurance Status Effect for {duration} seconds. This perk causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds.
name: Dead Hard

description: When you are in the Injured State, your Repair speed is increased by {speed}%.
name: Deadline

description: When entering a Locker while sprinting, you leave no Scratch Marks and do not trigger a Loud Noise Notification for {duration} seconds. A Decoy is left at the Locker.
name: Deception

description: After being unhooked or unhooking yourself, Will to Live activates for {duration} seconds. While active, when grabbed by the Killer, succeed a Skill Check to automatically escape their grasp, stunning them for 3 seconds.
name: Will to Live

description: The Auras of the 3 Generators with the most progress are revealed to you. Repairing a Generator highlighted by Deja Vu grants a {speed}% bonus to Repair speed.
name: Deja Vu

description: After unhooking a Survivor safely, Deliverance activates. When you are hooked, you can attempt to unhook yourself with a {chance}% chance of succeeding.
name: Deliverance

description: For each injured, hooked, or dying Survivor, gain a {speed}% bonus to Healing and Unhooking speeds.
name: Desperate Measures

description: After completing a Generator, the Auras of all Generators, Totems, and Chests within {range} metres are revealed for 10 seconds.
name: Detective's Hunch

description: You start the Trial with 3 Tokens. Whenever the Killer reads your Aura, 1 Token is consumed and your Aura is not revealed. When all Tokens are consumed, your Aura-reading ability is blocked for {duration} seconds.
name: Distortion

description: Press the Active Ability button while crouching to toss a pebble, creating a Loud Noise Notification at the location. This perk has a cooldown of {cooldown} seconds.
name: Diversion

description: When you heal another Survivor from Dying to Injured, the healed Survivor gains the Endurance Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Do No Harm

description: While in a Chase, press the Active Ability button to gain a random effect for {duration} seconds: +25% Haste, Endurance, or leave no Scratch Marks. This perk causes the Exhausted Status Effect.
name: Dramaturgy

description: When a Survivor you unhooked is hit by the Killer within {duration} seconds, the Killer's Aura is revealed to you and you gain a 7% Haste Status Effect for 10 seconds.
name: Duty of Care

description: For each Survivor who has been killed or sacrificed, you gain a {bonus}% bonus to Repair, Healing, and Sabotaging speeds.
name: Down to the Last

description: When you leave a Locker, you leave no Scratch Marks and make no noise for {duration} seconds. This effect has a 30-second cooldown.
name: Elusive

description: When injured, the Aura of your location is revealed to other Survivors within {range} metres.
name: Empathic Connection

description: The Auras of injured Survivors are revealed to you within {range} metres.
name: Empathy

description: When you cleanse a Totem, the Killer's Aura is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Eyes of Belmont

description: Each time another Survivor is hooked, Fast Track gains {tokens} Token(s). When you succeed a Great Skill Check while repairing, consume all Tokens. Each Token grants an additional 1% bonus to Repair progress.
name: Fast Track

description: After performing a fast vault in a Chase, gain a {speed}% bonus to Movement speed for 3 seconds.
name: Finesse

description: At the start of the Trial, the Auras of the {count} Generators closest to the Killer are revealed to you for 5 seconds.
name: Five Moves Ahead

description: You can see your own Scratch Marks. Your Walking speed is increased by {speed}%.
name: Fixated

description: After completing {threshold}% total Generator repair progress, Flashbang activates. Enter a Locker while the perk is active to craft a Flashbang.
name: Flashbang

description: While being carried by the Killer, your Wiggle progression is converted to {conversion}% from any Recovery progression you accumulated before being picked up.
name: Flip-Flop

description: While repairing a Generator in a Chase, you do not trigger Skill Checks for {duration} seconds.
name: Flow State

description: After performing a Great Skill Check while repairing a Generator, the Killer's Aura is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Fogwise

description: Press the Active Ability button while healing another Survivor to instantly heal them from Injured to Healthy, but you become Injured and gain the Broken Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: For the People

description: When you complete a Generator, all other Survivors within {range} metres gain a {speed}% bonus to Repair speed for 45 seconds.
name: Friendly Competition

description: When you complete a Generator, gain a {speed}% Haste Status Effect for 5 seconds.
name: Ghost Notes

description: When you complete a Healing action on another Survivor, you see the Killer's Aura for {duration} seconds.
name: Hardened

description: While in a Locker, press the Active Ability button to rush out and stun the Killer for {duration} seconds. This perk causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds.
name: Head On

description: When the Exit Gates are powered, you gain a {speed}% Haste Status Effect.
name: Hope

description: After each Good Skill Check completed while repairing a Generator, Hyperfocus gains 1 Token, up to {max} Tokens. Each Token increases the Skill Check's Bonus progression by 10% of its base value.
name: Hyperfocus

description: When another Survivor loses a Health State within {range} metres, you see the Killer's Aura for 5 seconds. The trail left by that Survivor's Scratch Marks is hidden from the Killer.
name: Inner Focus

description: After cleansing a Totem, Inner Strength activates. While in a Locker, heal one Health State over {duration} seconds.
name: Inner Strength

description: While crouched and not moving, press the Active Ability button to summon a Treacherous Crow at your location for {duration} seconds. If the Killer comes within 8 metres, the Crow alerts you.
name: Invocation: Treacherous Crows

description: In the Basement, hold the Active Ability button for 60 seconds to invoke a Weaving Spider. When completed, all Generators immediately gain {progress}% progress, but you are afflicted with the Broken Status Effect for the rest of the Trial.
name: Invocation: Weaving Spiders

description: Your Grunts of Pain are reduced by {reduction}%.
name: Iron Will

description: When a Survivor is hooked, all Survivors' Auras are revealed to each other. When you are on the Hook, the Killer's Aura is revealed to all Survivors within {range} metres.
name: Kindred

description: When you are the last Survivor remaining, gain the Endurance Status Effect. You can fully recover from the Dying State once per Trial.
name: Last Stand

description: Survivors within {range} metres of you benefit from a {speed}% bonus to Repair, Healing, Sabotaging, and Cleansing speeds.
name: Leader

description: When you are the last Survivor remaining in the Trial, the Aura of the Hatch is revealed to you within {range} metres.
name: Left Behind

description: Your footstep sounds are {reduction}% quieter while not sprinting.
name: Light-Footed

description: Your Scratch Marks disappear {duration} second(s) sooner than normal.
name: Lightweight

description: After performing a rushed vault, break into a sprint at 150% of your normal Running Movement speed for {duration} seconds. This perk causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds.
name: Lithe

description: When you become the last Survivor standing, your Scratch Marks, Pools of Blood, and Grunts of Pain are suppressed for {duration} seconds.
name: Low Profile

description: After being hit by a Basic Attack, Lucky Break activates. While active, you leave no Pools of Blood or Scratch Marks for {duration} seconds.
name: Lucky Break

description: When hiding inside a Locker, your Aura cannot be read and Grunts of Pain are suppressed. After leaving the Locker, you benefit from a {speed}% Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds.
name: Lucky Star

description: After being hit by a Basic Attack while in the Injured State, you gain the Endurance Status Effect for {duration} seconds and a 3% Haste Status Effect for 10 seconds.
name: Made for This

description: When you take 3 Protection Hits, Mettle of Man activates. When injured and healthy, the next hit that would put you into the Dying State is instead negated.
name: Mettle of Man

description: When you enter a Locker, Mirrored Illusion creates a clone of you at the Locker's location for {duration} seconds.
name: Mirrored Illusion

description: When the Killer hits you, you scream. For the next {duration} seconds, other Survivors' Auras are hidden from the Killer.
name: Moment of Glory

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: You are affected by the Broken Status Effect for the entire Trial. Your Grunts of Pain are reduced by {reduction}%.
name: No Mither

description: When the Exit Gates are powered, you gain a {speed}% bonus to Healing, Opening Exit Gates, Unhooking, and Sabotaging speeds.
name: No One Left Behind

description: After being unhooked or unhooking yourself, you gain the Endurance Status Effect for {duration} seconds and your Aura is hidden from the Killer.
name: Off the Record

description: While performing a cooperative action with another Survivor, both of you benefit from a {speed}% bonus to that action's speed.
name: One-Two-Three-Four!

description: Increases the Aura-reading ranges of your other perks and items by {range} metres.
name: Open-Handed

description: When injured, break into a sprint at 102% of your normal Running Movement speed for {duration} seconds. This perk causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds.
name: Overcome

description: After cleansing a Totem, you gain a {speed}% bonus to Repair speed for 30 seconds.
name: Overzealous

description: After stunning or blinding the Killer, your Scratch Marks and Pools of Blood are hidden for {duration} seconds.
name: Parental Guidance

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: Searching Chests is {speed}% faster and you always find a Medical Kit on your first Chest search.
name: Pharmacy

description: While in the Injured State, press the Active Ability button while crouching to enter the Dying State silently. While in this state, your Recovery speed is increased by {speed}%.
name: Plot Twist

description: The Auras of Chests are revealed within {range} metres. Items found in Chests are of a higher Rarity.
name: Plunderer's Instinct

description: After completing a Generator, you leave no Scratch Marks for {duration} seconds.
name: Poised

description: While repairing a Generator, press the Active Ability button to store up to {max} Charges of Potential Energy. Use them on another Generator for instant progress.
name: Potential Energy

description: While being carried by the Killer, you can drop a Pallet to stun the Killer and escape their grasp. Power Struggle activates when your Wiggle progression reaches {threshold}%.
name: Power Struggle

description: You hear a sound warning when the Killer is looking in your direction from {range} metres away.
name: Premonition

description: For each other Survivor within {range} metres of your location, gain a {speed}% bonus to Repair speed.
name: Prove Thyself

description: When performing a rushed action, you make no Loud Noise Notification. Quick & Quiet has a cooldown of {cooldown} seconds.
name: Quick & Quiet

description: While in a Chase near a Generator being repaired by at least one other Survivor, that Generator receives a {speed}% bonus to Repair speed.
name: Quick Gambit

description: When another Survivor is hooked, gain a {speed}% bonus to Healing speed for 30 seconds.
name: Rapid Response

description: When another Survivor is healed within {range} metres of you, you gain {progress}% Healing progress.
name: Reactive Healing

description: When within {range} metres of a hooked Survivor, press the Active Ability button to pause their Hook Stage progression for {duration} seconds.
name: Reassurance

description: After repairing a Generator for 3 seconds, Red Herring activates. When you enter a Locker, the Generator you were repairing triggers a Loud Noise Notification.
name: Red Herring

description: While repairing a Generator, press the Active Ability button to call upon The Entity to block the Generator for {duration} seconds. Blocked Generators do not regress.
name: Repressed Alliance

description: While injured, your Action speeds for Repairing, Healing, Sabotaging, Unhooking, Vaulting, Cleansing, Blessing, Opening Exit Gates, and Unlocking are increased by {speed}%.
name: Resilience

description: After being unhooked, you instantly gain {progress}% Healing progress.
name: Resurgence

description: While running, you see the Auras of Pallets and Windows within {range} metres.
name: Road Life

description: While repairing a Generator, you can see the Generator's regression progress highlighted in red for {duration} seconds after it regresses.
name: Rookie Spirit

description: The Auras of Hooks are revealed within {range} metres. Sabotaging Hooks takes 2.5 seconds instead of 3 seconds.
name: Saboteur

description: Completing a Generator while holding a depleted Item causes it to gain {charges} Charges.
name: Scavenger

description: When the Killer looks at you while in Chase, you scream. The Killer's Aura is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Scene Partner

description: After healing another Survivor for one Health State, Second Wind activates. When you are unhooked, you are automatically healed from Injured to Healthy over {duration} seconds.
name: Second Wind

description: You can heal yourself without a Med-Kit at {speed}% of the normal Healing speed.
name: Self-Care

description: When another Survivor within {range} metres is injured, your Scratch Marks, Grunts of Pain, and Pools of Blood are hidden for 6 seconds.
name: Self-Preservation

description: When you heal another Survivor one Health State, you both see the Auras of all other Survivors for {duration} seconds.
name: Shoulder the Burden

description: Your Hook escape attempts have a {chance}% increased chance of success.
name: Slippery Meat

description: You hear a sound warning when looking in the direction of a Totem within {range} metres.
name: Small Game

description: After stunning the Killer with a Pallet, break into a sprint at 150% of your normal Running Movement speed for {duration} seconds. This perk causes the Exhausted Status Effect.
name: Smash Hit

description: While affected by the Cursed or Condemned Status Effect, you benefit from a {speed}% bonus to Action speeds.
name: Solidarity

description: After being affected by the Endurance Status Effect, Soul Guard activates for {duration} seconds. While active and in the Dying State, you can fully recover.
name: Soul Guard

description: While repairing a Generator, you gain a Skill Check zone that is {size}% larger. Great Skill Checks grant additional progress.
name: Specialist

description: When the Killer is within {range} metres and has a direct line of sight to you, Spine Chill activates. While active, your Repair, Healing, and Sabotaging speeds are increased by 2/4/6%.
name: Spine Chill

description: When you start running, break into a sprint at {speed}% of your normal Running Movement speed for 3 seconds. This perk causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds.
name: Sprint Burst

description: While in the Killer's Terror Radius and not in a Chase, you accumulate a progression towards gaining a Token, up to {max} Token(s). Each Token increases Skill Check bonus zones by 1%.
name: Stake Out

description: While standing still for {duration} seconds, gain the ability to see Generator Auras within 64 metres.
name: Still Sight

description: Reduces the consumption rate of Item Charges by {reduction}% for you and other Survivors within {range} metres.
name: Streetwise

description: While in the Basement, your Self-Heal speed is increased by {speed}%.
name: Strength in Shadows

description: When you and another Survivor are both Healthy and working together, both of you gain the benefits of this perk. You leave no Scratch Marks or Pools of Blood for {duration} seconds.
name: Teamwork: Collective Stealth

description: When you repair a Generator with another Survivor, both of you gain a {speed}% bonus to Repair speed.
name: Teamwork: Full Circuit

description: After finishing a Healing action, you and the healed Survivor gain a {speed}% Haste Status Effect for 12 seconds.
name: Teamwork: Power of Two

description: While within {range} metres of another Survivor, both of you receive a bonus to Stealth actions.
name: Teamwork: Soft-Spoken

description: When you and another Survivor stun the Killer within {duration} seconds of each other, you both gain a bonus.
name: Teamwork: Throw Down

description: After healing another Survivor, both of you gain a {reduction}% bonus to damage taken reduction for 10 seconds.
name: Teamwork: Toughen Up

description: Failed Repair Skill Checks do not trigger a Loud Noise Notification. Failed Skill Checks regress the Generator by {penalty}% instead of the normal amount.
name: Technician

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: While in the Dying State, you can crawl {speed}% faster.
name: Tenacity

description: The Great Skill Check success zone of Repair and Healing Skill Checks is increased by {increase}%.
name: This Is Not Happening

description: After the Killer damages a Generator you are repairing, you see the Killer's Aura for {duration} seconds.
name: Troubleshooter

description: Your Recovery speed is increased by {speed}%. Once per Trial, you can fully recover from the Dying State.
name: Unbreakable

description: For each Survivor alive, the Luck of all Survivors is increased by {luck}%.
name: Up the Ante

description: Your Crouching Movement speed is increased by {speed}%.
name: Urban Evasion

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: Reduces the recovery rate of the Exhausted, Haemorrhage, Mangled, Hindered, and Blindness Status Effects by {reduction}% for you and other Survivors within {range} metres.
name: Vigil

description: The Auras of Generators within {range} metres are revealed to you.
name: Visionary

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: When opening an Exit Gate, its Aura is revealed to other Survivors within {range} metres. While opening an Exit Gate, the opening speed is increased by 5/10/15%.
name: Wake Up!

description: After unhooking a Survivor, your Healing speed is increased by {speed}% for 30/60/90 seconds.
name: We'll Make It

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: When you unhook a Survivor or are unhooked, gain a stackable 25% bonus to Bloodpoints for Protection Hit scoring events.
name: We're Gonna Live Forever

description: While another Survivor is being chased within {range} metres, the Killer's Aura is revealed to you.
name: We See You

description: After completing a Generator, press the Active Ability button to dash forward for {duration} seconds. This perk causes the Exhausted Status Effect.
name: Wicked

description: The Auras of Pallets, Breakable Walls, and Vault Locations are revealed within {range} metres.
name: Windows of Opportunity

description: After repairing a Generator for {threshold} seconds, Wiretap activates. Press the Active Ability button near a Generator to install a Wiretap. The Wiretap reveals the Killer's Aura to all Survivors when the Killer enters its range.
name: Wiretap
